resources.string:
1. Enable the Accessibility Service
2. Grant the "draw over other apps" (overlay) permission
3. Start the overlay below, then use the floating blue button to toggle Auto-Tap mode (it turns green when active).

While active: press and hold anywhere on screen. After a brief hold, that spot gets an automatic double-tap repeated every ~250ms until you lift your finger. A quick tap without holding still passes through as a normal single tap.
Allows Auto Tap to generate a double-tap gesture at the location you press and hold, so you do not have to tap the screen repeatedly yourself.
